player_notes.anthony edwards: Exited Game 4 with apparent left knee hyperextension; undergoing MRI. Status for Game 5 is uncertain — monitor closely before betting any props.
player_notes.donte divincenzo: Suffered torn right Achilles tendon in Game 4. Out for remainder of playoffs — remove from all prop consideration.
player_notes.kevin durant: Missed Game 3 vs. Lakers; status for Game 4 (Sunday) still unclear per coach Udoka. If out again, Rockets' usage/volume redistributes significantly.
player_notes.austin reaves: Was ruled out for Game 3. Monitor status for Game 4 vs. Rockets — if out, Lakers role players see elevated usage.
player_notes.joel embiid: Missed Game 3 vs. Celtics recovering from appendectomy. Status for Game 4 vs. Celtics unclear — absence inflates Celtics' counting stats, deflates 76ers' frontcourt props.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Out Game 3 with concussion. Monitor availability for Game 4 vs. Blazers — if still out, Castle/Harper usage remains elevated.
player_notes.ayo dosunmu: Exploded for 43 points in Game 4 with Edwards and DiVincenzo both injured. Expect elevated usage and scoring role in Game 5 if Edwards remains out.
player_notes.stephon castle: Scored 33 points in Game 3 without Wembanyama. If Wemby remains out for Game 4, Castle is a strong points/assists target.

game_notes.MIN vs DEN: Anthony Edwards (knee, MRI) and Donte DiVincenzo (torn Achilles) both left Game 4. Edwards' Game 5 status is critical — his absence would massively inflate Dosunmu and other Wolves' usage.
game_notes.LAL vs HOU: Kevin Durant missed Game 3 and his Game 4 status is uncertain. Austin Reaves also missed Game 3 — both players' availability must be confirmed before locking Lakers/Rockets props.
game_notes.SAS vs POR: Victor Wembanyama (concussion) missed Game 3. If still out for Game 4, Castle and Harper remain high-usage scoring targets.
game_notes.BOS vs PHI: Joel Embiid (appendectomy) missed Game 3. His Game 4 status is unclear — if out, Celtics' stars face a weaker defensive assignment and 76ers' frontcourt props are diminished.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: DiVincenzo is not mentioned in the season context document at all — no injury note exists for him.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news reports that Donte DiVincenzo suffered a torn right Achilles tendon in Game 4 vs. Denver. Charles Barkley cites injuries to both Edwards and DiVincenzo as reasons MIN cannot celebrate. This is a new season-ending injury not reflected anywhere in the context doc.

Also update the DEN-MIN series diary G4 entry and the playoff injury landscape to note this as a second significant MIN injury alongside Edwards.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: G4: Left game with a LEFT knee injury after only 18 min (5 pts, 1-8 FG); did not return; severity unclear with testing underway postgame. Now listed QUES per injury report.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Edwards 'will undergo an MRI after leaving Saturday's Game 4 win with an apparent hyperextension of his left knee.' The injury is now described specifically as a hyperextension, and an MRI is confirmed as the next diagnostic step. The context doc notes severity is unclear — MRI results are still pending but the mechanism (hyperextension) is now confirmed.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Edwards' injury note in the playoff injury landscape to specify the mechanism: 'apparent hyperextension of left knee; MRI scheduled.' Status remains QUES pending MRI results. This is the most critical availability variable for G5 of DEN-MIN.

The injury landscape lists Durant with a 'right knee contusion' and separately references an 'ankle injury' in the G3 diary.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news (Apr 25) states: 'Kevin Durant improving, but Game 4 status vs. Lakers unclear' — Ime Udoka said Saturday that Durant was 'doing better' but G4 availability is still unclear. This confirms Durant remains OUT for G4 (Apr 27) with status unresolved, consistent with the context doc, but the 'improving' characterization is a new development that slightly elevates his G4 return probability versus the prior framing.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Durant's injury note in the playoff injury landscape and LAL-HOU series diary to reflect: 'Durant described as improving by Udoka (Apr 25) but G4 status still unclear — monitor final injury report before G4 (Apr 27).' The ankle injury label should be reconciled — context doc references both knee contusion (original) and ankle (G3 diary); clarify which is the current active injury.

Before G4 picks, verify whether Williams has been cleared or upgraded for G4 via the official OKC injury report, as his return for an elimination game is plausible and would significantly affect OKC prop ceilings.
